opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: She hasn't slept in two nights because her head is intensely itchy, and I keep feeling a tickling movement in her hair.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My child's scalp is intensely itchy, she can't sleep, and I can feel movement in her hair.

symptom_narrative.onset: ~2 weeks of mild itch, severe over last 48h
symptom_narrative.character: intense scalp itch, crawling sensation, worse at night, scratching
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: no sleep for 2 nights, constant scratching
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: her scalp, especially behind the ears and back of the head
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: visible tiny insects and grey-white eggs stuck to the hair; scratch marks on the neck; NO fever, no honey-crusting/pus yet, no rash elsewhere
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: exhausted, irritable, poor sleep; contagious to household/school

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with siblings; shared bedroom/bedding/soft toys; high household/school transmission risk

objective_data_offered.value: live moving lice and grey-white nits stuck near the scalp base behind the ears/occiput, scratch marks on the neck, visible on video
